comment: Hand-calc: state=CA, flood_zone='AE' -> AE multiplier (1.30) * CA base (1480.00 from III, NAIC excludes CA) + CA earthquake addon (850.00 CEA + private-market avg) = 1924.00 + 850.00 = 2774.00. Tests forward-compat flood path (v1.1 callers ALWAYS pass flood_zone=None per RESEARCH correction #1; this fixture exercises the X/A/AE/V multiplier rows that are scaffolding for v1.2).
